globalNews.title: Ebola risk raised to 'very high' in DR Congo
globalNews.summary: The head of the UN health agency says the risk in the wider region is "high", but it remains "low" at the global level.

globalNews.title: Rubio tries to reassure Nato allies over US troop deployments
globalNews.summary: President Donald Trump says he wants to send more troops to Poland, a week after his officials cancelled a similar deployment.

globalNews.title: Cubans grapple with fuel shortages and blackouts as US steps up pressure
globalNews.summary: The BBC speaks to Havana residents after the US charges the country's former leader, Raúl Castro, with murder.

globalNews.title: UK scientists developing Ebola vaccine that could be ready for trials in months
globalNews.summary: The rare species of Ebola involved - known as Bundibugyo - kills around a third of those infected and has no proven vaccine yet.

globalNews.title: US navy chief says $14bn arms sale to Taiwan paused due to Iran war
globalNews.summary: Hung Cao told a Senate hearing they were "doing a pause" on the sale to make sure they had munitions for the Iran war.

cryptoNews.title: NYSE owner ICE to launch oil-linked futures with OKX
cryptoNews.summary: ICE and OKX plan to launch oil-linked perpetual futures based on Brent and WTI benchmarks, bringing crypto derivatives further into traditional energy markets under licensing restrictions.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin miner MARA spent $4.3M on CEO security in 2025 as crypto attacks rise
cryptoNews.summary: MARA spent $4.3 million on CEO Fred Thiel’s security in 2025, including vehicle armoring, as crypto wrench attacks increased globally.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Space X IPO: 'Bad news' for tech stocks but what about Bitcoin?
cryptoNews.summary: SpaceX’s IPO could turn the Mag 7 into a Mag 8, with Tesla and SpaceX comprising 25% of the group's Bitcoin balance-sheet exposure.

cryptoNews.title: DeFi hacks shake institutional confidence as risks outpace yields
cryptoNews.summary: Repeated bridge exploits and shrinking yields are making institutions question whether DeFi’s risks still justify the returns, says Symbiotic’s Putiatin.

aiNews.title: We tried Google’s AI glasses and they’re almost there
aiNews.summary: Google demoed prototype Android XR glasses that overlay Gemini-powered translation, navigation, and other information directly into your field of view.

aiNews.title: Spotify and Universal Music strike deal allowing fan-made AI covers and remixes
aiNews.summary: Spotify is partnering with  Universal Music Group￼ to let Premium subscribers create AI-generated song covers and remixes, with participating artists receiving a share of the revenue.

aiNews.title: Six search engines worth trying now that Google isn’t really Google anymore
aiNews.summary: Google is about to look really different, and if you're not a fan of the AI overview feature, then you're not going to like what's coming.

aiNews.title: Trump delays AI security executive order, saying language ‘could have been a blocker’
aiNews.summary: President Trump delayed signing an executive order that would have required pre-release government security reviews of AI models, citing dissatisfaction with the order's language.

aiNews.title: Spotify adds AI-powered Q&A and briefing generation features to podcasts
aiNews.summary: Spotify will let you generate daily or weekly briefs based on your prompts
